title: Update WhatsApp outstanding reminder default template

requirements.summary: Update the default WhatsApp outstanding reminder message so it starts with a greeting and includes the selected customer name and INR-formatted outstanding balance using the exact provided template.
acceptanceCriteria: When a user selects "Send outstanding via WhatsApp" for a customer with a valid mobile number and outstandingBalance > 0, the WhatsApp message edit dialog opens with the message pre-filled using the new template.
The pre-filled message replaces "(Customer Name)" with the selected customer’s name.
The pre-filled message replaces "(Outstanding Balance)" with the customer’s outstanding balance formatted as INR (consistent with current formatting behavior).
The user can still edit the message in the dialog and the edited text is used to generate the WhatsApp deep link.

file_operations.description: Update formatOutstandingMessage() to produce the exact required template text: "नमस्कार (Customer Name) आपली खाते बाकी लवकरात लवकर जमा करून सहकार्य करावे. (Outstanding Balance)", replacing placeholders at runtime with the provided customer name and the existing INR currency formatting.

Confirm the "Send outstanding via WhatsApp" action continues to use formatOutstandingMessage(customer.name, customer.outstandingBalance) as the source of the dialog’s default message, ensuring the updated template is what gets pre-filled before the user edits and sends.
